description: Repo-native code-generation verifier tasks for the SCBE CLI harness. These are host-sandbox checks for generated code artifacts, not public leaderboard parity claims.

tasks.title: Generate and verify a JavaScript clamp module
tasks.instructions: Run the SCBE task-corpus codegen task that asks the harness to generate clamp.js and test-clamp.js, then rerun the generated test.

tasks.title: Generate and verify a Python prime-coordinate module
tasks.instructions: Run the SCBE task-corpus codegen task that asks the harness to generate prime_coordinate.py and test_prime_coordinate.py, then rerun the generated test.
